---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# AbstractQuantumObject

```{julia}
using QuantumToolbox
```

```{julia}
@doc AbstractQuantumObject
subtypes(AbstractQuantumObject)
```

>QuantumObject
>QuantumObjectEvolution

## QuantumObject

```{julia}
@doc QuantumObject
```

### fields

```{julia}
fieldnames(QuantumObject)
```

>(:data, :type, :dimensions)

## QuantumObjectEvolution

```{julia}
@doc QuantumObjectEvolution
```

### fields

```{julia}
fieldnames(QuantumObjectEvolution)
```

>(:data, :type, :dimensions)
>data::DataType
>type::ObjType
>dimensions::DimType

### methods

---
QobjEvo(
    op_func_list::Union{Tuple, AbstractQuantumObject};
    type = nothing,
)

```{julia}
# a case
H0 = 0.5 * sigmaz()
H1 = sigmax()
p = (T = 100.0) # p are parameters
s(p, t) = t / p.T
H = QobjEvo((
    H0,
    (H0 - H1, s), # s*(H0 - H1)
))
```

---
QobjEvo(op::QuantumObject, f::Function; type = nothing)

>The f parameter is time-dependent coefficient that multiplies the operator.
>So the function could only be use to calculate single term with time.

---
QobjEvo(A::QuantumObjectEvolution)(p, t)
>得到具体时刻的op.

---
QobjEvo(A::QuantumObjectEvolution)(ψout, ψin, p, t)
>直接写入已有的 ψout.

---
QobjEvo(A::QuantumObjectEvolution)(ψ, p, t)
>直接计算 H(p,t)∣ψ⟩.
